title: cyclamen persicum subsp. mindleri
intro: Cyclamen persicum subsp. mindleri, commonly known as the Turkish cyclamen, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Primulaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various ailments such as fever, colds, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Cyclamen persicum subsp. mindleri include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe sore throats and reduce the severity of cold symptoms. Traditionally, herbal preparations of the plant are made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
